title: Where the story begins
desc: Following the formation of our new team at SUFE, 12 new members joined, many of whom were still getting to know one another.

title: First Competition
desc: Fully prepared for nearly 3 months and won the silver medal.

title: Peer-monitoring when lockdown
desc: Spontaneously trained by ourselves to maintain our skills.

title: The Annual Rundown
desc: After a year of rigorous training, our efforts paid off with gold, silver, and bronze medals across various events.

title: Tianjin talent show
desc: Our team was invited to showcase our skills on a Tianjin Television talent show.

title: Open Ceremony of the Basketball Tournament
desc: We were invited to perform at the opening ceremony of the varsity basketball tournament.

title: New city unlocked by us together
desc: We took a three-hour bus journey to Zhejiang, marking our first time competing away from home.

title: Competition in Hainan
desc: Thousands miles away from school. Btw, funding for a trip like this is hard to come by, but our coach truly believed in our potential and went above and beyond to get us here.

title: The National Championship
desc: Highest level of competition we've ever participated in. We were up against seriously elite competition here.

title: Graduation Trip
desc: We took a 7-day road trip through Xinjiang all together, covering 1,500 km on a self-driving journey that was as challenging as it was breathtaking.

title: Graduation
desc: It's an intermission, but not the final curtain. Our friendship continues beyond graduation, and we'll always be a family.
